exercises.name: Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.notes: Box at 24cm height, don't go too low

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Single Leg
exercises.notes: One leg straight, 8 reps each leg

muscleGroupNotes.back: Pull-ups on back day — try extending arms fully
muscleGroupNotes.biceps: Left bicep is weaker than right
muscleGroupNotes.shoulders: 5 min warmup. Do dumbbell overhead press.
muscleGroupNotes.abs: Try decline crunches — very low movement
muscleGroupNotes.chest: Do incline dumbbell first. Use pec fly machine not cables for flys.
muscleGroupNotes.triceps: Order: dips → both arm pushdown → overhead extension → single arm pushdown
muscleGroupNotes.legs: 1. Use free barbell squat. 2. Hip thrust: one leg straight, no weight, 8 reps each. 3. Bulgarian: box 24cm, don't go too low.
